ew_context: Price breaking above congested consolidation zone - potential wave 3 or C wave initiation from key support cluster
pattern_desc: Breakout above heavily tested resistance at 109.60 with 15 prior touches. Price clearing immediate resistance with neutral RSI providing upside room.
key_levels: Support: 109.60 (broken resistance now support), 109.51 (swing low). Resistance: 110.04-110.08 (swing high cluster)
invalidation: Close back below 109.60 on M15 timeframe negates breakout validity
market_context: Risk-off sentiment from Iran tensions may pressure AUD, but JPY weakness could still favor the cross in near-term
